form.formComment: Third-up today. Not raced for 48 days. Resuming won by 2.5 len at Chantilly All Weather February 5 over 1600m defeating Tevere with 58kg at $6.20. Last start second last of 7 at Chantilly All Weather on February 27 over 1600m, 5.5 len behind Nurlat carrying 55.5kg at $2.70. Better than the last run suggests and can make amends.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: At debut, won won by 1.3 len at Saint-Cloud March 29 over 1600m on a rain affected track defeating Galistars carrying 58kg at $21. Has upside and may pay to follow.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(8.5). At debut, won won by 1.3 len at Saint-Cloud March 29 over 1600m on a rain affected track defeating Galistars carrying 58kg at $21. Has upside and may pay to follow.

form.formComment: Was as a despised roughie at debut, 7th of 10 at Chantilly All Weather on March 16 over 1600m, 12 len behind Harissa with 58kg at $67. Others look better placed.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(12). Was as a despised roughie at debut, 7th of 10 at Chantilly All Weather on March 16 over 1600m, 12 len behind Harissa with 58kg at $67. Others look better placed.

form.formComment: Resumes racing after a long spell. Only one run when won by a head at Deauville October 22 over 1600m in heavy going defeating Flash Girl with 58kg at $4.90. Winning chance again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(13). Resumes racing after a long spell. Only one run when won by a head at Deauville October 22 over 1600m in heavy going defeating Flash Girl with 58kg at $4.90. Winning chance again.

form.formComment: Resuming after six months in the paddock. Finished off last campaign fourth of 9 at Chantilly in the G3 Prix Miesque October 27 over 1400m, soft track; 5 len behind Half Sovereign carrying 56kg at $13. First up last campaign fourth of 7 at Deauville in the G3 Prix Des Reservoirs October 20 over 1600m, soft track; 1.75 len behind Rhiyanna with 56kg at $19. This is an ideal race to kick off. Top hope.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Resuming after six months in the paddock. Finished off last campaign fourth of 9 at Chantilly in the G3 Prix Miesque October 27 over 1400m, soft track; 5 len behind Half Sovereign carrying 56kg at $13. First up last campaign fourth of 7 at Deauville in the G3 Prix Des Reservoirs October 20 over 1600m, soft track; 1.75 len behind Rhiyanna with 56kg at $19. This is an ideal race to kick off. Top hope.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after four months ran last of 8 at Chantilly on April 2 over 1600m, 11 len behind Sahimaa carrying 57kg at $25. Previously second-up 4th of 9 at Chantilly on September 15 over 1600m, on a slow track; 2.75 len behind Zlata with 54.5kg at $16. Expecting her to kick on with that first run out of the way.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(4.5). Second run back. First-up after four months ran last of 8 at Chantilly on April 2 over 1600m, 11 len behind Sahimaa carrying 57kg at $25. Previously second-up 4th of 9 at Chantilly on September 15 over 1600m, on a slow track; 2.75 len behind Zlata with 54.5kg at $16. Expecting her to kick on with that first run out of the way.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after three months favourite; won by 2.5 len at Le Mans March 20 over 1600m in soft going defeating Esiol with 58kg at $2.30. Previously second-up 6th of 12 at Chantilly All Weather on November 21 over 1600m, 1.5 len behind Vanta with 58kg at $4.50. Impressive on that occasion but isn?t among the top hopes today.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(10). Second-up. First-up after three months favourite; won by 2.5 len at Le Mans March 20 over 1600m in soft going defeating Esiol with 58kg at $2.30. Previously second-up 6th of 12 at Chantilly All Weather on November 21 over 1600m, 1.5 len behind Vanta with 58kg at $4.50. Impressive on that occasion but isn?t among the top hopes today.

form.formComment: Second run back. Comes off a 37-day let-up. First-up after four months 6th of 10 at Saint-Cloud on March 10 over 2000m, on a slow track; 9 len behind Pearled Majesty carrying 55.5kg at $31. Previously second-up won by a long-neck at Saint-Cloud November 14 over 2000m defeating Meridys carrying 58kg at $4.50. Still early in the prep and needs another run or two.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(3). Second run back. Comes off a 37-day let-up. First-up after four months 6th of 10 at Saint-Cloud on March 10 over 2000m, on a slow track; 9 len behind Pearled Majesty carrying 55.5kg at $31. Previously second-up won by a long-neck at Saint-Cloud November 14 over 2000m defeating Meridys carrying 58kg at $4.50. Still early in the prep and needs another run or two.

form.formComment: Freshened since claiming her maiden victory on debut; scored a big 4.5 len win at Chantilly All Weather March 3 over 1900m defeating Mennula with 58kg at $3.50. Excellent debut and should prove hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(12.5). Freshened since claiming her maiden victory on debut; scored a big 4.5 len win at Chantilly All Weather March 3 over 1900m defeating Mennula with 58kg at $3.50. Excellent debut and should prove hard to beat.
